0.0: Wales / Cymru -- a nation of the UK on Britain's western peninsula.
Gwynedd -- the county of north-west Wales: Eryri and the Llyn peninsula.

1.0: Ceidio -- a scattered rural community on the Llyn, inland of Tudweiliog.
the house -- David's home at Ceidio, stone under slate.
the room -- the room this block was written from.
